news.t: Broadcom's Post-Earnings Slide Highlights These ETFs

holdings.infoBox: AVS is an equity ETF with a total of 11 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily AVGO Bear 1X ETF (AVS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund provides inverse (-1x) exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Broadcom Inc. stock. AVS was launched on Oct 10, 2024 and is issued by Direxion.

data.title: Broadcom's Post-Earnings Slide Highlights These ETFs
data.text: Confirming that the bar is high for artificial intelligence (AI) semiconductor makers' earnings reports, shares of Broadcom (AVGO) plunged 12.59% on June 4, a day after the chip giant delivered quarte...
